---
title: "R Training"
author: "Loren"
date: 2026-03-18
format: html
editor: visual
---

Note outside of code chunk

```{r}
# note inside of code chunk

9
9
6
typeof(8.5)

```
```{r}

typeof("8.5")
```

```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
a
c("a", "b", "c")
c(TRUE, FALSE)
c(1, "two", 3)
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(id = 1:3.
                 mode = c("walk","car","bus")
                 distance = c(1.2, 5.0, 3.4))
df
str(df)
```
